bids.reasoning: Given that it is the very start of the negotiation (t=0.0), my strategy is to propose a high-utility offer for myself and observe how the opponent responds. This seems to be an anchoring strategy, trying to push me towards lower utility options from the outset. Since time is not a factor at this point, I will propose an offer that maximizes my utility, focusing on the highest valued preferences.

The opponent's messages suggest a willingness to collaborate but have not demonstrated through their offers any meaningful concession, reinforcing my strategy to maintain a high-utility stance early on.
